ogTitle: Gregory River vs Greymare: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gregory River and Greymare.
heading: Gregory River vs Greymare — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gregory River, Queensland and Greymare, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Gregory River has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Greymare (33/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gregory River or Greymare safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gregory River has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Greymare scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gregory River scores 37/100 for bushfire risk. Greymare scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gregory River or Greymare?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Gregory River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
